summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a top‑five 1973 performance, highlighted by a stellar Dark Star → Eyes → China Doll sequence.
review: The reviewer places this 2/15/73 show among their all‑time favorites, praising the extended Dark Star into Eyes and finishing with China Doll as a must‑listen highlight. The soundboard tape is described as clear and classic when heard on headphones, with no reported flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance (top‑five show, standout Dark Star sequence) and the tape quality, leading to a high rating despite limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the recording sounds clear and classic on headphones; no technical complaints are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is praised as a quintessential 1973 performance, with the Dark Star → Eyes → China Doll sequence highlighted as a peak moment.
